Camisas Morenas became hardened, using his machete as both symbol and weapon, and his reputation grew as someone who defended his group fiercely. Though he once dreamed of a simple life, his path led him deeper into conflict, and his loyalty to Muerte marked him as a dangerous figure. It is said that he will appear on day 21 at night.
Description.ZombieRepetidor: Zombie Repetidor was once a human who lived in the Marshall Islands, especially on Bikini Atoll. He was of Ecuadorian origin, known as Elver Gonzalo Samboni, who traveled there seeking a new life. A skilled farmer, he specialized in fruits and vegetables, dedicating himself to his harvests. Everything changed drastically in 1954 when the United States detonated nuclear bombs on the islands. Residents were forced to abandon their homes to avoid death from the experiments, but Elver refused, believing it was all lies, and hid underground. When the explosions occurred, everyone thought he had died. The islands became desolate, uninhabitable due to radiation. Yet, against all odds, Elver survived. His skin became burned and rotten over the years, and he transformed into a zombie. This was partly due to a strange enchanted eggplant salad he had created, designed to revive him after explosions though only as a zombie. Despite his transformation, he remained alive and devised a way to return to Ecuador. He infiltrated a luxury boat bound for Ecuador, arriving in Atacames, and later returned to his hometown of Quito. There, he began eating junk food, which made him obese but also increased his muscular strength. One day, he decided to steal a Ballesta Repetidora to practice shooting, since he had no legal permits to own a firearm and stealing one could have cost him his life. He trained relentlessly until he became an expert marksman. Although he may look like just another common zombie, do not be fooled if he sees you, he will start shooting. Eventually, he allied himself with the group Muerte, becoming another deadly shooter. He will appear on day 13 at night.
Description.Sparkster: Sparkster is the opossum Rocket Knight hero created by Konami, first appearing in Rocket Knight Adventures (1993) and continuing in Sparkster (1994) and later entries. Armed with a sword and a rocket pack, he defends the Kingdom of Zephyrus with courage and agility. Midway in his lore here, Sparkster aligns with the Alianza, a protective group dedicated to defending allies and resisting corruption — he is non-hostile by default and only retaliates when provoked. Recognizable by his blue-and-red armor, Sparkster is brave, loyal, and resilient, excelling at fast movement and precise strikes while inspiring those around him. He will appear on Day 2 at any hour.
Description.Tulio: Born in Santiago de Chile in 1995, during the post-Pinochet era, he grew up fascinated by fashion trends—jeans and striped shirts defined his style—and his curiosity about the world only grew stronger. At the age of 18, he chose not to attend the University of Santiago, preferring instead to dedicate himself to uncovering the truth behind the mysterious, unidentified Pacific islands. He had seen reports on TVN describing these islands, places that neither the United States nor Russia had managed to investigate despite their obsession. Rumors spread that only certain living beings could enter, and only they could learn the islands’ true origin. Determined, he sought illegal means to reach them, traveling to Easter Island in hopes of finding an abandoned boat to continue his journey. Fate intervened when violent winds and hurricanes struck, throwing him into the ocean. Yet nature itself seemed to protect him, carrying him safely to the very islands he sought. There he encountered both humans and non-humans—Naomi, Paco, El Marihuanero, El Marihuanero Mamón, and Ricardo. Together they formed a family, bound by survival and mystery. Eventually, he joined the group known as Alianza, dedicated to searching for survivors and uncovering the secrets of the Pacific islands. His journey became not only a quest for knowledge but also a testament to resilience, curiosity, and the strange destiny that united him with others on the islands.
Description.Brayan: Brayan was born on January 12, 2000, in London, England. From a young age he dedicated himself to studying physics and biology, inspired by figures such as Charles Darwin and Isaac Newton. At the age of 25, he received a special voucher to travel to Alaska, United States, to further his studies of nature and frozen physics. He accepted, but during the journey an unexpected accident changed his life: the pilot fainted due to a natural cause, the plane lost control, and it crashed. Brayan survived thanks to the winds of nature, which carried him away from drowning and guided him to a mysterious island in the Pacific. From that moment, he began to survive using the knowledge he had acquired in his studies, applying physics and biology to endure the harsh environment. One day he met Tulio, who was impressed by Brayan’s survival methods and offered him the chance to join the group known as Alianza. This group was formed by people of good spirit, dedicated to protecting each other while collecting information about the unknown and mysterious islands. Brayan accepted, and from then on he became part of a family on the island, while keeping alive his hope of one day returning to England.
Description.Richard: Richard is the twin brother of Ricardo. Unlike him, Richard was born in South Africa in 2004, during the post-apartheid era. When he turned 18, he began his life as an adventurer, driven by curiosity and a desire to explore the unknown. Later, he met Ricardo during a scientific journey in Mexico, and despite their different origins, they bonded deeply and became brothers in spirit. When Ricardo departed for the mysterious Pacific islands, Richard decided to undertake the same expedition, but with a unique difference: he designed and built a machine capable of traveling anywhere without the need for ships, boats, or conventional vehicles. His invention was a success, and he used it to embark on his journey, eventually arriving at the same destination as Ricardo. Upon reaching the island, Ricardo welcomed him as his true brother and introduced him to the companions he had met there. From that moment, Richard became part of the family and joined the group known as Alianza. His arrival brought new energy to the team, as his inventive mind and adventurous spirit complemented Ricardo’s resilience. Richard’s machine, though damaged during the voyage, became a symbol of hope for the group, showing that human ingenuity could rival even the mysteries of the islands. Together with Naomi, Paco, and the others, Richard contributed to the survival and exploration of the unknown land, strengthening the bonds of Alianza and keeping alive the dream of one day uncovering the secrets of the Pacific islands.

WatermelonSeedBlock:0.Description: Watermelon seeds are used to grow watermelons. They require suitable soil and enough light to reach full size.
WatermelonSeedBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Extract seeds from a watermelon slice

BlueberrySeedBlock:0.Description: Blueberry seeds are used to plant blueberry bushes. Plant them on suitable soil and provide enough light for healthy growth. Young bushes start as small sprouts and mature over time into full blueberry bushes.

LetterWarBlock:0.Description: A sealed envelope with no sender name. It seems important... Reading it might lead to something dangerous. You can find this letter inside a chest that appears near you after surviving all green night waves.

DoubleMusketBlock:0.Description: A double-barreled musket that can fire two shots before reloading. It can use standard bullets or powerful Anti-Tanks rounds that deal massive damage and penetrate armor. Crafted with a musket, iron ingot, and planks.
DoubleMusketBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Craft a double musket from a musket, iron ingot, and planks

AppleSaplingBlock:0.Description: A young apple tree sapling. When planted in suitable soil with enough light and proper temperature, it will grow into a full apple tree bearing delicious apples. Apple trees thrive best in temperate climates with moderate humidity.
AppleSaplingBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Grow apple sapling from apple leaves

PearSaplingBlock:0.Description: A young pear tree sapling. Plant it in rich soil under open sky and it will mature into a pear tree with sweet, juicy pears. Pear trees prefer slightly warmer temperatures and higher humidity than apple trees.
PearSaplingBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Grow pear sapling from pear leaves

CherrySaplingBlock:0.Description: A young cherry tree sapling. When placed in fertile ground with plenty of sunlight, it will grow into a beautiful cherry tree full of small red cherries. Cherry trees favor cooler climates and moderate humidity.
CherrySaplingBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Grow cherry sapling from cherry leaves

OrangeSaplingBlock:0.Description: A young orange tree sapling. Plant it in warm soil with good sunlight exposure and it will develop into an orange tree producing juicy oranges. Orange trees require the warmest temperatures and high humidity among fruit trees.
OrangeSaplingBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Grow orange sapling from orange leaves

BlueberryBushBlock:0.Description: A wild bush that grows in cool environments with moderate humidity. You can harvest fresh blueberries from it, which are a good source of hydration.

PearWoodBlock:0.Description: Wood obtained from pear trees. Useful for building and crafting.

PearLeavesBlock:0.Description: Leaves from a pear tree. They may occasionally drop pears.

OrangeWoodBlock:0.Description: Wood obtained from orange trees. Durable and useful for crafting.

OrangeLeavesBlock:0.Description: Leaves from an orange tree. They can sometimes drop oranges.

CherryWoodBlock:0.Description: Wood obtained from cherry trees. It has a decorative and elegant appearance.

CherryLeavesBlock:0.Description: Leaves from a cherry tree. They may occasionally drop cherries.

AppleWoodBlock:0.Description: Wood obtained from apple trees. Can be used for building and crafting.

AppleLeavesBlock:0.Description: Leaves from an apple tree. Sometimes they can drop apples.

RottenAppleBlock:0.Description: A decayed apple covered in brown spots and mold. Eating it may cause food poisoning and offers no nutritional value.

RottenPearBlock:0.Description: This pear has turned mushy and foul-smelling. Consuming it could make you sick and provides little to no sustenance.

RottenOrangeBlock:0.Description: A shriveled orange with a bitter, fermented odor. Eating it risks stomach pain and nausea.

RottenCherryBlock:0.Description: Wrinkled and leaking sticky juice, this cherry is well past its prime. Ingesting it may lead to illness.

RottenSliceOfWatermelonBlock:0.Description: A soggy, discolored slice of watermelon that smells like sour yeast. Likely to cause digestive distress.

RottenBananaBlock:0.Description: A blackened, soft banana with a pungent alcoholic scent. Eating it can make you nauseous and drain your energy.

RottenBlueberryBlock:0.Description: These berries are moldy and have a fermented taste. Not safe for consumption unless you want to get sick.

AppleBlock:0.Description: A fresh and juicy fruit that restores a small amount of hunger and slightly reduces thirst. Grows in temperate climates with moderate humidity.

PearBlock:0.Description: A sweet and soft fruit that provides moderate nutrition and contributes to hydration. Found in temperate zones with high humidity.

OrangeBlock:0.Description: A citrus fruit rich in juice that restores hunger and provides a good amount of hydration. Grows in warm, humid tropical areas.

CherryBlock:0.Description: A small and sweet fruit that offers low nutrition but a slight hydration effect. Thrives in cooler climates with low humidity.

SliceOfWatermelonBlock:0.Description: A very refreshing fruit with high water content that significantly reduces thirst.

BananaBlock:0.Description: An energy-rich fruit that restores a good amount of hunger and provides decent hydration. Grows on banana trees in warm, humid climates.

BananaWoodBlock:0.Description: A lightweight, fibrous wood obtained from banana trees. Not as strong as oak, but useful for basic construction and crafting.

BananaLeavesBlock:0.Description: Large, broad leaves from banana trees. They provide shade and can be used as a natural canopy or decorative element.

BananaSaplingBlock:0.Description: A young banana tree that will grow into a full banana tree over time. Plant it on soil in warm environments and wait for it to mature.
BananaSaplingBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Obtained by crafting with Banana Leaves.

BlueberryBlock:0.Description: A small and nutritious fruit that offers little energy but slightly helps with thirst.

BoiledWaterBucketBlock:0.Description: A bucket filled with boiled water. Drinking it safely restores hydration.
BoiledWaterBucketBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Clean boiled water stored in a bucket.

AK48Block:0.Description: A powerful assault rifle with high rate of fire and large magazine. Uses 7.62mm rounds.
AK48Block:0.CRDescription:0: Crudely crafted but deadly assault rifle

AK48BulletBlock:0.Description: Ammunition for the AK-48 assault rifle. Large caliber rounds with excellent penetration power.

Master308Block:0.Description: Precision .308 caliber sniper rifle. Robust design and excellent stability for long-range shots.

Master308BulletBlock:0.Description: .308 caliber ammunition for sniper rifle. High-precision rounds with great stopping power.

FreezeBombBlock:0.Description: A specialized explosive bomb filled with cryogenic compounds. Upon detonation, it releases a freezing blast that lowers temperatures, inflicts cold damage, and can cause creatures to catch a cold. Affected targets move slower and periodically cough or sneeze.
FreezeBombBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Upon explosion, it releases a wave of cold that reduces temperature, causes freezing damage, and can give creatures a cold, slowing their movement.

FreezingSnowballBlock:0.Description: A snowball infused with freezing energy. When thrown, it leaves a frosty trail and upon impact rapidly lowers the target's body temperature (player: reduces to 6°C, then 3°C, then 1°C, then 0.1°C), causes knockback (increasing with each hit), and after four hits induces hypothermia and death. Affected creatures are knocked back and may catch a cold (645s flu). Obtained only by defeating Infected Freezers that spawn in cold biomes or during winter, or by purchasing from the Pirata Hostil Comerciante for 20 Nuclear Coins (stack up to 40).

RemoteControlBlock:0.Description: Use to manage Green Night. Opens the control interface. Can only be crafted after completing all waves.

NuclearCoinBlock:0.Description: A coin forged in a post-apocalyptic world. It cannot be crafted, but can be obtained by killing mobs, completing achievements, and claiming their rewards. Used to trade with the Pirata Hostil Comerciante and for other purposes such as hiring and more, depending on the player's needs.

ToxinBlock:0.Description: An extremely poisonous material saturated with lethal toxins. It cannot be crafted and is mainly obtained as loot from venomous creatures such as Infected Normal 3, Infected Normal 4, Boomer 3, Flying Infected 2, Flying Infected Boss, Tank 3, and Tank Ghost 3. Alternatively, it can be purchased from shops or traded with Pirata Hostil Comerciante

MediumFirstAidKitBlock:0.Description: A medical kit designed to treat injuries by restoring a significant portion of health. Heals the target up to about half of their maximum health. Can be used on yourself or on other nearby creatures.
MediumFirstAidKitBlock:0.CRDescription:0: A basic medical kit that heals wounds up to 50% or 100% if above half health.

LargeFirstAidKitBlock:0.Description: A powerful medical kit capable of fully restoring health. Instantly heals the target to maximum health. Can be used on yourself or on other nearby creatures.
LargeFirstAidKitBlock:0.CRDDescription:0: An advanced medical kit that always heals to 100% regardless of current health.

AntidoteBucketBlock:0.Description: A bucket containing a powerful medicinal antidote made from antiflu tea and purple flowers. Drinking it removes poison and sickness from the body, stopping their harmful effects. It can be used on yourself or on other infected creatures. Also restores some thirst.
AntidoteBucketBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Brew a medicinal antidote by combining antiflu tea with purple flowers. Removes poison and sickness.

TeaAntifluBucketBlock:0.Description: A bucket filled with medicinal tea. Drinking it cures influenza and relieves its symptoms. It can also be used to treat infected creatures. Also restores some thirst.
TeaAntifluBucketBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Prepare anti-flu tea by heating a bucket of water with tall grass. Cures influenza.

BoiledWaterBowlBlock:0.Description: A bowl filled with boiled water. Safe to drink and restores thirst.

CactusJuiceBowlBlock:0.Description: A bowl of cactus juice. Refreshing and restores some thirst.

WatermelonBlock:0.Description: A juicy watermelon that grows on the ground in warm climates. When fully ripe, it drops watermelon slices.

RottenWatermelonBlock:0.Description: This watermelon has gone bad. Better not eat it.

AntidoteBowlBlock:0.Description: A medicinal bowl that cures poison and sickness.
AntidoteBowlBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Boil anti-flu tea with purple flowers

TeaAntifluBowlBlock:0.Description: A warm herbal tea that cures flu.

WaterBowlBlock:0.Description: A bowl filled with water. It may not be safe to drink.

EmptyBowlBlock:0.Description: An empty bowl. Useful for holding liquids.

WoodenLongspearBlock:0.Description: A longspear is an extended wooden polearm that provides excellent reach. It can be thrown or used in melee combat. Thrown longspears will stick into soft surfaces. The wooden construction is basic but effective.
WoodenLongspearBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Craft a wooden longspear using planks, a stick, and a wooden spear.

StoneLongspearBlock:0.Description: A longspear with a stone tip, offering better durability and damage than its wooden counterpart. Its extended reach makes it effective against foes from a distance. Thrown spears can embed deeply into targets.
StoneLongspearBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Craft a stone longspear using cobblestone, a stick, and a stone spear.

CopperLongspearBlock:0.Description: A copper-headed longspear that balances reach and striking power. Copper provides improved sharpness and longevity. Ideal for hunters and warriors seeking a reliable polearm.
CopperLongspearBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Craft a copper longspear using a copper ingot, a stick, and a copper spear.

IronLongspearBlock:0.Description: An iron longspear with formidable durability and piercing capability. Its weight and balance make it a fearsome weapon in both melee and thrown attacks. A staple for seasoned fighters.
IronLongspearBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Craft an iron longspear using an iron ingot, a stick, and an iron spear.

DiamondLongspearBlock:0.Description: The diamond longspear is a masterwork weapon, combining exceptional sharpness, durability, and reach. It glistens with lethal elegance and can penetrate even the toughest hides.
DiamondLongspearBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Craft a diamond longspear using a diamond, a stick, and a diamond spear.

LavaLongspearBlock:0.Description: A longspear forged with the essence of magma, radiating intense heat. It can sear wounds on impact and is incredibly durable. Only the bravest warriors dare wield this molten weapon.
LavaLongspearBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smelt a Lava Spear with an Iron Hammer to create a Lava Longspear.

CopperSharpHammerBlock:0.Description: A hammer with a sharpened copper head, designed for both blunt force and cutting. It delivers devastating strikes that can crush armor and wound flesh alike.
CopperSharpHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smith a copper sharp hammer using a copper machete and an iron hammer.

IronSharpHammerBlock:0.Description: An iron hammer with a keen edge, balancing weight and sharpness perfectly. Its powerful swings can break bones and slice through protections with ease.
IronSharpHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smith an iron sharp hammer using an iron machete and an iron hammer.

DiamondSharpHammerBlock:0.Description: A masterfully crafted hammer with a diamond-sharpened head. It combines incredible hardness with razor edges, capable of shattering the toughest defenses.
DiamondSharpHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smith a diamond sharp hammer using a diamond machete and an iron hammer.

LavaSharpHammerBlock:0.Description: A legendary hammer infused with molten fury. Its sharp edge glows with heat, searing wounds on contact while delivering crushing blows that few can survive.
LavaSharpHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smith a lava sharp hammer using a lava machete and an iron hammer.

CopperThinHammerBlock:0.Description: A lightweight hammer with a slender head. Faster than standard hammers, making it ideal for quick excavation and mining.
CopperThinHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smelt a copper pickaxe with an iron hammer.

IronThinHammerBlock:0.Description: A durable thin-headed hammer that balances speed and strength. Excellent for large digging projects.
IronThinHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smelt an iron pickaxe with an iron hammer.

DiamondThinHammerBlock:0.Description: An incredibly fast and resilient thin hammer. Its diamond head cuts through terrain with ease.
DiamondThinHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smelt a diamond pickaxe with an iron hammer.

LavaThinHammerBlock:0.Description: A blazing hot thin hammer that melts through soft materials. Extremely fast and long-lasting.
LavaThinHammerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Smelt a lava pickaxe with an iron hammer.

TargetStickBlock:0.Description: A specialized stick used to command allied creatures. When pointed at an enemy, it signals all nearby player-allied creatures to focus their attacks on the target. Useful for coordinating attacks and managing your creature army in battle.
TargetStickBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Useful for selecting an attack target so your allied creatures focus on the chosen enemy.

PoisonBombBlock:0.Description: A green bomb that releases poisonous gas upon explosion. Perfect for poisoning areas and weakening enemies from a distance.
PoisonBombBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Toxic bomb that releases poisonous gas instead of explosive force.

BigStonePoisonChunk:0.Description: A giant rock imbued with toxic properties. Upon impact, it releases a poisonous cloud that slowly weakens its victims. While the initial damage is moderate, the lingering poison effect can be deadly over time. Like the rare giant rock, it cannot be crafted and can only be obtained through special means.

BigStoneFlameChunk:0.Description: A flaming rock that creates fire on impact. The fire lasts for 30 seconds. Can kill instantly and sets area ablaze.

PoisonBulletBlock:0.Description: Similar to a musket round, but it cannot be used as musket ammunition and is not available for crafting.

CollarBlock:0.Description: A specialized collar used to tame hostile infected creatures. When applied, it transforms them into loyal companions that will defend and assist you. Particularly useful for controlling dangerous enemies and turning them into powerful allies.
CollarBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Used to tame hostile infected creatures and turn them into allies.

RefrigeratorXiaomiBlock:0.Description: A Xiaomi refrigerator is a household appliance designed for cooling and storing food. It is defined as a smart refrigerator that provides efficient preservation of perishable goods. In the mod it is useful as an object that represents a modern appliance and expands building options. Its main utility is to preserve food if you are tired of it spoiling quickly, both raw and cooked, giving more durability time. Note: the refrigerator requires energy such as a battery, lever, or another electrical source, otherwise it will not work.
RefrigeratorXiaomiBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Useful for storing raw or cooked food if you're tired of it spoiling quickly.

AirConditionerBlock:0.Description: A climate control device that adjusts ambient temperature. Configurable via interface, can cool water and melt ice within an adjustable radius.
AirConditionerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: To control the temperature in your beautiful home

BigStoneChunk:0.Description: A strange rock, seemingly unearthed from the Paleolithic era its true origin remains a mystery. Oh no! What makes it most alarming is its deadly power: a single throw can kill any person instantly. Even worse, the thought of Tanks wielding it as a throwable weapon is a dire omen. Beware if one of these massive stones is hurled your way, you are already as good as dead. As a note, this rare giant rock cannot be crafted; only Tanks will possess it. Unless you resort to cheats such as using Creative mode or similar methods to obtain one but it’s not recommended.

TridentBlock:0.Description: A legendary three-pronged spear historically associated with sea deities like Poseidon in Greek mythology, symbolizing dominion over the oceans. In ancient times, it was both a divine symbol and a formidable weapon used by warriors and sea gods alike. Forged from rare materials found in the deepest ocean trenches, this Trident channels the power of the tides. While it can be crafted using extremely expensive resources including iron blocks and enchanted marine crystals, the more direct method to obtain it is by defeating Hombre Agua in battle. Wield it to command respect on both land and sea.
TridentBlock:0.CRDescription:0: A historical weapon, a symbol of Poseidon and Neptune, that does so much damage?

ScyteBlock:0.Description: The Scythe is a long, curved-bladed weapon originally designed as a farming tool for cutting crops, but in dark fantasy it is seen as a weapon of death, often wielded by demons, skeletons, and reapers. In this world, the Scythe cannot be crafted because it has no recipe and is extremely difficult to obtain. The only way to acquire the Scythe is by killing El Señor De Las Tumbas Moradas. Be careful: its lethality is extreme, capable of killing you with a single strike.

WoodAxeBlock:0.Description: Back to basics - like the old days
WoodAxeBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Back to basics - like the old days

WoodShovelBlock:0.Description: Simple digging - back when life was easier
WoodShovelBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Simple digging - back when life was easier

StoneMacheteBlock:0.Description: Back when stone could cut - version 2.0 memories
StoneMacheteBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Back when stone could cut - version 2.0 memories

StoneRakeBlock:0.Description: Ancient farming tool - back to roots
StoneRakeBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Ancient farming tool - back to roots

StonePickaxeBlock:0.Description: How could I forget the old days, bro? :")
StonePickaxeBlock:0.CRDescription:0: How could I forget the old days, bro? :")

LavaSpearBlock:0.Description: Forged in magma - burns through anything
LavaSpearBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Forged in magma - burns through anything

LavaMacheteBlock:0.Description: Molten blade that dismembers with burning precision
LavaMacheteBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Molten blade that dismembers with burning precision

LavaShovelBlock:0.Description: Digs through earth like it's butter - hot butter
LavaShovelBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Digs through earth like it's butter - hot butter

ItemsLauncherBlock:0.Description: Launches any type of block or object. Although expensive to craft, it's a powerful weapon like the musket. Be careful!
ItemsLauncherBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Launches any block or item. Expensive but powerful, similar to the musket.

FlameThrowerBlock:0.Description: The flamethrower is an incendiary weapon designed to project controlled fire. It was invented by Richard Fiedler in 1901 and first used in combat by the German army in 1915 during World War I. It works by using a fuel tank (usually thickened gasoline or oil) and compressed gas to propel the burning stream through a nozzle with ignition. To use it, the operator must insert Flame Bullets as ammunition, then pull the trigger to unleash fire against enemy fortifications or groups of soldiers. The advantage is that it supports up to 15 rounds (15/15), giving the player sustained firepower before reloading. The Flame Bullet is the secondary ammunition: incendiary projectiles that complement the flamethrower, useful for ranged attacks and maintaining pressure on the enemy.
FlameThrowerBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Improved musket with fuel tank and ignition system. Uses incendiary projectile or poison gas projectiles.

FlameBulletBlock:0.Description: Fire-based projectile for the flamethrower. On impact, it ignites terrain and creatures, may trigger explosions at high speed, and inflicts burn damage.
FlameBulletBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Incendiary ammo for flamethrower. Burns on impact.

FlameBulletBlock:1.Description: Chemical projectile for the flamethrower. Releases toxic gas that infects creatures with poison or disease, weakening them over time and dealing additional damage.
FlameBulletBlock:1.CRDescription:1: Poisonous ammunition for the flamethrower. Infects targets on impact.

RepeatCrossbowBlock:0.Description: An advanced version of the standard crossbow, optimized for sustained ranged fire. Unlike the normal crossbow which fires a single bolt before reloading, the Repeating Crossbow features an internal 8-bolt magazine and progressive tension system allowing continuous fire. It deals slightly less damage per shot than the normal crossbow but has a higher fire rate and faster reload. Compatible with special bolts: Copper, Iron, Diamond, Explosive, and Poison.
RepeatCrossbowBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Automatic crossbow with 8-arrow magazine - complex mechanical design

RepeatArrowBlock:0.Description: Lightweight bolt for repeating crossbows, made of copper. Provides moderate damage and high stability during rapid firing. Optimized to maintain accuracy in sustained automatic fire.
RepeatArrowBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Copper bolt for repeating crossbows. Moderate damage and high stability.

RepeatArrowBlock:1.Description: Reinforced iron bolt for repeating crossbows. Deals higher damage and better armor penetration than standard iron bolts while maintaining accuracy in sustained bursts.
RepeatArrowBlock:1.CRDescription:1: Iron bolt for repeating crossbows. Higher damage and better armor penetration.

RepeatArrowBlock:2.Description: A high-tier bolt tipped with diamond, designed for advanced repeating crossbows. It delivers exceptional armor penetration and consistently high damage. Its reinforced construction prevents breakage on impact and retains much of its velocity while traveling through water.
RepeatArrowBlock:2.CRDescription:2: Diamond bolt for repeating crossbows. Does not break on impact and retains its velocity in water.

RepeatArrowBlock:3.Description: Explosive bolt for repeating crossbows. Creates small explosions on impact. While individual damage is lower than standard explosive bolts, it allows rapid explosive bursts, ideal for crowd control and area denial.
RepeatArrowBlock:3.CRDescription:3: Explosive bolt for repeating crossbows. Rapid explosive bursts for crowd control.

RepeatArrowBlock:4.Description: Low-lethality poison bolt. Deals low initial damage but applies poison for 30 seconds. Ideal for weakening enemies without killing them instantly.
RepeatArrowBlock:4.CRDescription:4: Poisonous bolt for repeating crossbows. Low damage but applies poison effect.

RepeatArrowBlock:5.Description: Highly toxic bolt for repeating crossbows. Applies a severe poison effect for 100 seconds. Designed to weaken entire groups through rapid status application.
RepeatArrowBlock:5.CRDescription:5: Highly poisonous bolt for repeating crossbows. Applies severe poison effect.

AA12Block:0.Description: A gas-operated, magazine-fed automatic shotgun with an open-bolt design. Originally designed by Maxwell Atchisson in 1972 for military and law enforcement applications, it fires 12-gauge shotgun shells at a rate of 300 RPM with a magazine capacity of 8 to 20 rounds depending on the magazine. Its bullpup configuration and improved recoil system significantly reduce felt recoil, allowing controllable automatic fire even with powerful ammunition. In this mod, it uses AA12Bullet cartridges and fires 8 pellets per shell, being devastating at close to medium range.
AA12Block:0.CRDescription:0: Fully automatic shotgun with low recoil. Fires 12-gauge shells with multiple pellets for devastating close-range damage.

M249Block:0.Description: The M249 Squad Automatic Weapon (SAW) is a belt-fed light machine gun that provides sustained automatic fire for infantry squads. Fires 5.56×45mm NATO rounds at a rate of 750-1000 RPM. Has a 100-round belt capacity and uses intermediate cartridges for manageable recoil during automatic fire. Requires M249 ammunition blocks for reloading.
M249Block:0.CRDescription:0: Belt-fed light machine gun for sustained automatic fire. Uses 5.56×45mm NATO rounds with manageable recoil.

NewG3Block:0.Description: A modern assault rifle with advanced polymer construction and enhanced accuracy. Designed for versatile combat situations, it provides a balanced mix of firepower and handling, making it suitable for mid to long-range engagements.
NewG3Block:0.CRDescription:0: Modern assault rifle with improved accuracy and handling for versatile combat.

NewG3Bullet:0.Description: A 10-round magazine containing 7.62×51mm NATO ammunition for the G3 rifle. Provides reliable penetration and stopping power against armored targets.
NewG3Bullet:0.CRDescription:0: High-caliber ammo for the G3 rifle, ideal for penetrating armor and engaging targets at medium to long range.

MP5SSDBlock:0.Description: A suppressed submachine gun designed for stealth operations. Its integrated suppressor reduces muzzle flash and noise, making it ideal for covert missions and close-quarters combat.
MP5SSDBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Suppressed submachine gun for stealth and close-quarters combat.

MP5SSDBulletBlock:0.Description: A 12-round magazine with subsonic 9×19mm Parabellum rounds for the MP5SD. Optimized for quiet, effective engagements without sacrificing stopping power.
MP5SSDBulletBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Subsonic ammo for MP5SD, ideal for stealth and close-quarters combat.

MendozaBlock:0.Description: A semi-automatic rifle renowned for its excellent accuracy and reliability. Ideal for marksmen who require precision at medium to long ranges without the need for full-auto fire.
MendozaBlock:0.CRDescription:0: High-precision semi-automatic rifle for medium to long-range engagements.

MendozaBulletBlock:0.Description: 8 rounds of .308 Winchester ammunition, designed for precision shooting. Offers high accuracy and penetration, suitable for hunting and tactical engagements.
MendozaBulletBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Precision ammunition for the Mendoza rifle, ideal for medium to long-range engagements.

GrozaBlock:0.Description: A bullpup assault rifle featuring an integrated grenade launcher system. Compact yet powerful, it excels in close to medium-range combat with high versatility and firepower.
GrozaBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Compact bullpup assault rifle with integrated grenade launcher for versatile combat.

GrozaBulletBlock:0.Description: 10 rounds of special 9×39mm subsonic ammunition for the Groza rifle. Designed for stealth operations with reduced noise and effective armor penetration.
GrozaBulletBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Special subsonic ammo for the Groza, ideal for stealth and close-quarters combat.

M249BulletBlock:0.Description: Ammunition box containing 5.56×45mm NATO rounds for the M249 SAW. Each box provides 100 rounds of belt-fed ammunition. Insert into the M249 to fully reload the weapon to its maximum capacity.
M249BulletBlock:0.CRDescription:0: 100 rounds of 5.56×45mm NATO ammunition for the M249 SAW. Provides sustained firepower for extended engagements.

BaseballBatBlock:0.Description: A simple melee weapon with solid impact damage. Reliable, durable, and effective at close range.
BaseballBatBlock:0.CRDescription:0: A classic blunt weapon, perfect for bashing enemies at close range.

AKBlock:0.Description: Legendary assault rifle firing 7.62×39mm rounds. Good accuracy, moderate recoil. Uses AK47Bullet ammunition. Fires at ~350 RPM.
AKBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Reliable Russian assault rifle, perfect for beginners in automatic weapons

BK43Block:0.Description: A simple and reliable double-barrel shotgun. Holds two rounds and is highly effective at close range due to pellet spread.

BK43BulletBlock:0.Description: Ammunition used by the BK-43. Effective at close range with strong stopping power and wide spread.

KABlock:0.Description: Advanced assault rifle that fires 5.56x45mm rounds. Unlike the AK-47, the KA offers superior accuracy, minimal recoil, and a 40-round magazine. Uses ammunition specifically designed for the KA.

KABulletBlock:0.Description: 5.56x45mm ammunition specifically designed for the KA rifle. Offers higher muzzle velocity, improved ballistics compared to standard ammunition, and a 40-round magazine capacity.

AUGBlock:0.Description: Bullpup assault rifle with low recoil. Uses 5.56×45mm NATO. Cycles through 6 different bullet types automatically. Integrated optical sight.
AUGBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Austrian bullpup assault rifle with low recoil and integrated sight

FamasBlock:0.Description: French bullpup with high rate of fire (~667 RPM). Uses NuevaBala4 projectiles. Compact design with good controllability.
FamasBlock:0.CRDescription:0: French bullpup assault rifle with high rate of fire and compact design

G3Block:0.Description: Mexican assault rifle (FX05 Xiuhcoatl) firing powerful rounds. Uses NuevaBala projectiles. Good rate of fire and accuracy.
G3Block:0.CRDescription:0: Mexican assault rifle with good accuracy and power

Izh43Block:0.Description: Double-barrel shotgun firing 8 pellets per shot. Devastating close-range. 2-round capacity, uses Izh43Bullet.
Izh43Block:0.CRDescription:0: Russian double-barreled shotgun with high damage at close range

M4Block:0.Description: 5.56×45mm carbine firing 3-round bursts. Uses NuevaBala2 projectiles. 22-round magazine, excellent modularity.
M4Block:0.CRDescription:0: American M4 carbine with better accuracy than AK-47

Mac10Block:0.Description: Compact machine pistol with extreme rate of fire (~600 RPM). Uses NuevaBala3 projectiles. Intense recoil, 30-round magazine.
Mac10Block:0.CRDescription:0: Compact .45 ACP machine pistol with high rate of fire

MinigunBlock:0.Description: Rotary machine gun firing NuevaBala6 projectiles at ~750 RPM. 100-round capacity, devastating suppression weapon.

P90Block:0.Description: Bullpup PDW with 900 RPM rate of fire. Cycles through 6 bullet types. 50-round magazine, 5.7×28mm rounds.
P90Block:0.CRDescription:0: Compact bullpup PDW with high rate of fire and large magazine

RevolverBlock:0.Description: Classic revolver firing powerful single shots. Uses NuevaBala4 projectiles. 6-round cylinder, high stopping power.
RevolverBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Classic .357 Magnum revolver with excellent stopping power

SCARBlock:0.Description: Modular battle rifle with excellent accuracy. Cycles through 6 bullet types. 600 RPM, 30-round magazine.
SCARBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Versatile battle rifle with excellent accuracy and modular design

SniperBlock:0.Description: Bolt-action precision rifle for extreme long-range engagements. Equipped with high-magnification scope. Delivers single-shot kills with proper aim. Requires steady positioning and patience.
SniperBlock:0.CRDescription:0: High-powered bolt-action sniper rifle with scope for long-range precision

SPAS12Block:0.Description: Combat shotgun firing 8 pellets per shot. 8-round capacity. Can fire in pump or semi-auto modes.
SPAS12Block:0.CRDescription:0: Italian combat shotgun with pump-action and semi-auto modes

SWM500Block:0.Description: Desert Eagle .50 caliber pistol with tremendous stopping power. Single-shot, uses NuevaBala4 projectiles. 5-round magazine.
SWM500Block:0.CRDescription:0: .50 AE Desert Eagle hand cannon with massive stopping power

UziBlock:0.Description: Iconic submachine gun with high rate of fire (~750 RPM). Uses NuevaBala2 projectiles. 30-round magazine.
UziBlock:0.CRDescription:0: Israeli submachine gun with better stability than Mac-10

AA12BulletBlock:0.Description: 8-round 12-gauge magazine for the AA-12 shotgun. Each shell contains 8 pellets that spread when fired, being especially effective against groups of enemies at close range. The ammunition is shotgun-type, specifically designed for the AA-12 feeding system.
AA12BulletBlock:0.CRDescription:0: 12-gauge shells for the AA-12 shotgun, containing 8 pellets each for devastating close-range damage.

AKBullet:0.Description: 30-round magazine for AK-47 rifle. Contains 7.62×39mm ammunition.

InfectedSpawnEggBlock:2.Description: Generates an exceptionally powerful boss-class infected when shattered. These formidable opponents possess immense durability and strength, demanding superior weaponry and tactics to overcome in combat.

InfectedSpawnEggBlock:3.Description: Releases an airborne infected upon destruction against any surface. The resulting creature takes to the skies, granting it the ability to bypass ground-level obstacles and assault players from elevated positions.

InfectedSpawnEggBlock:4.Description: Spawns a bestial infected after being thrown and broken. Drawing from animalistic traits, this variant relies on raw speed and ferocity rather than supernatural abilities to overwhelm its prey.

InfectedSpawnEggBlock:5.Description: Conjures an ethereal infected when smashed. These spectral entities move with unnatural swiftness and possess a degree of intangibility, enabling them to slip through attacks and strike with ghostly precision.

LetterWarDialog.Title: WAR LETTER
LetterWarDialog.Message:
From the Cartel of Los Bandidos (Cartel de Los Bandidos):
After surviving the Green Night, you proved that at least
you could make it through the green nights, from the easiest
to the hardest.
However, we want to declare war on you as a new
challenge. We want to know if you can survive once again.
If you accept, tomorrow at dawn we’re gonna beat the hell out of you.
But if you manage to win the war against us, we’ll leave you alone
forever. Not a single bullet anymore.
If you refuse, you’ll still be able to read this letter for now.
But everyone will know you’re a damn coward hiding
before a real fight.
The Cartel never forgives. Choose carefully, for your own damn sake.
Signed: The Council of Bandidos
LetterWarDialog.AcceptMessage: You accepted the war, idiot. The Cartel is gonna crush you at dawn. You already signed your own sentence.
LetterWarDialog.AcceptBeforeGreenNightMessage: You accepted the war right before the Green Night falls. Infected and narcos are going to hit you from all sides at the same time. Tonight you won't sleep, you'll pray. Enjoy hell, you bastard!
LetterWarDialog.RejectMessage: You rejected the challenge, coward. The letter will stay here, but don’t think we forgot about you. The Cartel always comes back.

GreenNightDifficulty.VeryEasy_Desc: "Grandpa vs. the World" mode. The infected look at you with pity, and their attacks feel more like a massage than a hit. They don't touch your structures, can't even ride a foal, and their explosions are as disappointing as a damp firecracker. They wander around so carefree that it never even occurs to them to protect themselves (no armor). Build your empire without fear. Perfect for anyone who wants to feel invincible without breaking a sweat.
GreenNightDifficulty.Easy_Desc: A walk in the park, even if the park is full of angry infected. They still respect your walls, but their punches are starting to hurt for real. Explosions are noticeable but won't level everything, and the infected are so clumsy they can't even remember how to open doors. Their protection is practically nonexistent (they almost never wear armor). Great for warming up before life really starts hitting back.
GreenNightDifficulty.Normal_Desc: The average survivor's daily routine. Hits that hurt just enough, normal toughness, no structure damage, no mounts, no surprises. Explosions are the usual: flashy but manageable. The infected wear no protection, so they go down fairly easily. Your base is safe... for now. Think of it as an ordinary day before your boss (the apocalypse) decides to test you.
GreenNightDifficulty.Medium_Desc: Now the real party begins. The infected learn how to use their hands to tear down your walls, and as if that wasn't enough, they can open doors too. You're not even safe in the bathroom! Explosions are no longer a joke, and every hit feels like getting run over by a truck. Some of them have even had the brilliant idea of putting on armor (medium chance), making them much tougher. Therapy won't help anymore.
GreenNightDifficulty.Hard_Desc: Welcome to hell. The infected ride beasts, flank you from every side, use ranged weapons, and instead of retreating, they charge even harder. Your buildings are like houses of cards: one gentle touch and they're gone. Explosions wipe out everything in their path. Most of them now wear armor (high chance), making them much harder to kill. Whoever built your shelter should probably start looking for a new job... or a coffin.
GreenNightDifficulty.Extreme_Desc: You've lost your mind. The infected are killing machines: faster, stronger, hungrier. They tear down everything they touch, their explosions flatten entire city blocks, and if you're not careful, they'll surround you with no escape. Almost all of them wear full armor (very high chance), turning them into walking tanks. There's no safe corner, no plan that works. Beat this, and you'll earn either madness... or a gravestone with your name on it.
GreenNightDifficulty.Impossible_Desc: Think you've hit rock bottom? Think again. There are no second chances here. This mode only unlocks after surviving absolute insanity. The infected are practically gods: not even Creative Mode can save you from a single hit. Their explosions erase the landscape, and to make matters worse, your allies become completely useless. They won't attack the infected, won't help you when you're under attack, ignore your orders, and pretend nothing's happening when the Green Night falls. Nearly all of the infected wear the best armor available, making every blow you land feel like punching solid rock. You're completely alone. This isn't a game. It's a death sentence. And no, there's no going back.

HireWidget.Title: HIRE MERCENARY
HireWidget.LoreText: Before you kill me or run away, know that I am not like those bandits who kill everything. I used to be one of them, but I rebelled against their ways. If you want proof that I'm different, the only way is to pay me {0} Nuclear Coins. Then you can give me weapons, distance, and fire. I swear I will be your loyal companion. If you don't want to, no problem – I'll still be here until you change your mind.

AutoCannonWidget.Title: Auto-Cannon
AutoCannonWidget.HelpText:
Authors
Fire Dragon
Kike
----------
This weapon uses the first slot of the hotbar or the first available slot with an object. To save any changes, you must press 'Accept', or 'X' to discard. The spread and velocity settings determine the direction and distance of the projectiles.

To use it, simply hold right click if you are on PC, or hold the screen if you are on a mobile device, and it will automatically fire the times per second you have configured. Useful for shooting spawn eggs and generating creatures in large quantities in a short time.

You can also have fun launching fireworks or any other object.
